abilities.description:
When you encounter a strange and unstable phenomena, you may @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.90c1db535c31ad7e]{Begin the Scene} to investigate the source or nature of the anomaly. Then, when you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.0daf0460e4faa6fa]{Finish the Scene} by proposing a theory:

  • Strong hit: The theory proves correct. Mark 1 tick on your discoveries legacy track.
  • Weak hit: As with a strong hit, but the knowledge exacts a cost. Pay the Price.
  • Miss: You are dangerously wrong. @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.78baa51694fe37c5]{Pay the Price}, making it a dire cost.

The mysteries deepen. When you score a strong hit to @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.0daf0460e4faa6fa]{Finish the Scene} in a dangerous or formidable challenge, you may also @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.75d5b0762ebab856]{Make a Discovery} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.6848983199a497df]{Confront Chaos} if it fits the established nature of the anomaly.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} (severe or major) as you confront an anomaly, you may envision how the hardship inspires a helpful recollection or epiphany. If you do, reroll any dice when you make a move (once only) to act on the insight.
